groups.name: g2rain.web
groups.description: G2rain Web 模块的配置属性

properties.name: g2rain.web.http-wrapper-filter-enabled
properties.description: HTTP 请求响应包装器 Filter 是否启用

properties.name: g2rain.web.http-wrapper-filter-order
properties.description: HTTP 请求响应包装器 Filter 执行顺序

properties.name: g2rain.web.global-exception-filter-enabled
properties.description: 全局异常 Filter 是否启用

properties.name: g2rain.web.principal-context-scope-filter-enabled
properties.description: 身份主体作用域 Filter 是否启用

properties.name: g2rain.web.principal-context-scope-filter-order
properties.description: 身份主体作用域 Filter 执行顺序

properties.name: g2rain.web.global-exception-filter-use-custom-json
properties.description: 全局异常 Filter 数据自定义序列化是否启用

properties.name: g2rain.web.global-exception-filter-order
properties.description: 全局异常 Filter 执行顺序

properties.name: g2rain.web.principal-context-filter-enabled
properties.description: 身份主体上下文注入 Filter 是否启用

properties.name: g2rain.web.principal-context-filter-order
properties.description: 身份主体上下文注入 Filter 执行顺序

properties.name: g2rain.web.access-log-filter-enabled
properties.description: 访问日志 Filter 是否启用

properties.name: g2rain.web.access-log-filter-order
properties.description: 访问日志 Filter 执行顺序

properties.name: g2rain.web.login-guard-interceptor-enabled
properties.description: 登录校验拦截器是否启用

properties.name: g2rain.web.login-guard-interceptor-order
properties.description: 登录校验拦截器执行顺序

properties.name: g2rain.web.identity-param-injector-enabled
properties.description: 身份参数注入拦截器是否启用

properties.name: g2rain.web.identity-param-injector-order
properties.description: 身份参数注入拦截器执行顺序

properties.name: g2rain.web.global-exception-handler-enabled
properties.description: 全局异常处理器是否启用

properties.name: g2rain.web.enable-result-mixin-filter
properties.description: 是否启用 Result / BaseError MixIn 字段过滤
